hooks.command: python -c "import sys,json,subprocess; d=json.load(sys.stdin); f=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); subprocess.run(['dart','format',f]) if f.endswith('.dart') else None" 2>/dev/null || true

python -c "import sys,json,subprocess,os; d=json.load(sys.stdin); f=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); subprocess.run(['flutter','pub','get'],cwd=os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(f))) if f.endswith('pubspec.yaml') else None" 2>/dev/null || true
python -c "import json; print(json.dumps({'systemMessage': 'Reminder: run flutter test to verify changes. Coverage gaps: services/sync, analytics.'}))"
